regions.us-ports: Today, Miami experiences ENE 11kt winds, overcast conditions, and less than 10% rain probability, with no impact on port operations. Heat Advisory in effect for Los Angeles and Long Beach (temperature up to 86°F) and San Diego (temperature up to 90°F). Over the next 48 hours and beyond, Miami can expect continued overcast conditions, with a 13% rain probability on Day 2 and a 34% rain probability on Day 3, which may affect shore excursions.
regions.bahamas-central-caribbean: Today, elevated heat is a concern with a heat index reaching 100F, partly cloudy skies, and less than 10% rain probability in Nassau. Over the next 24-48 hours, Nassau and nearby ports can expect increasing cloud cover, with a 13% rain probability on Day 2 and ESE winds at 13kt. By Day 3, rain is forecast with an 18% rain probability, potentially affecting shore excursions in the Bahamas, including Freeport and the Berry Islands.
regions.eastern-caribbean: Today, a Heat Advisory is in effect for San Juan with partly cloudy conditions and 16% rain probability, posing a risk to passengers during outdoor shore excursions. Over the next 24-48 hours, San Juan and St. Thomas may experience drizzle with a 16% rain probability on Day 1, and less than 10% rain probability on Day 2. Beyond 48 hours, St. Maarten and St. Kitts could see thunderstorms with a 24% rain probability on Day 3.
regions.western-caribbean: Today, clear skies and an ENE 8kt wind are prevailing in Cozumel, with less than 10% rain probability. By Day 3, thunderstorms are forecast for Cozumel, Roatan, and Belize City, with a 12% rain probability.
regions.southern-caribbean: Today, elevated winds of 20kt from the east are present in Aruba, with overcast conditions and less than 10% rain probability. Beyond 48 hours, wind speeds are expected to decrease to 17kt in Aruba, with a chance of drizzle and a 12% rain probability.
regions.lesser-antilles: Today, Barbados is experiencing overcast conditions with an ENE wind of 12kt and a 21% rain probability. By Day 3, thunderstorms are forecast for Barbados and St. Vincent with a 44% rain probability, which is expected to impact shore excursions.

regions.los-angeles: Today, clear skies and a less than 10% rain probability will provide favorable conditions for cruise ship operations in Los Angeles / San Pedro. Beyond 48 hours, foggy conditions with SSW 8kt winds and less than 10% rain probability are expected to affect Catalina Island.
regions.ensenada: Today, clear skies and a less than 10% rain probability prevail in Ensenada with winds from the west-southwest at 7kt.
